title: prunus mira
intro: Prunus mira, also known as the Chinese plum or Mira plum, is a type of stone fruit tree native to China and other parts of Asia. The bark, leaves, and flowers of Prunus mira have been used in traditional Chinese medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Prunus mira include reducing fever, alleviating coughs and sore throats, and supporting cardiovascular health. Prunus mira can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts for medicinal use, although its preparation and dosage should be guided by a healthcare professional.
